## [00:00 - 00:16]

Buy a walkie-talkie. Look, you got five minutes. I want your best price and I got to leave. Excellent, sir. Why don't I do this? You have a business card or a phone. I'll get you the best price. I'll phone it to you. I'll fax it to you. I'll email it to you if that will be helpful in saving you time.
